query_normalized: systematic assessment of non-coding variant effects on transcription factor binding affinities biology
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) as it investigates the mechanism of transcription factor binding and cooperativity, which is the core biological process underlying the user's question about variant effects on binding affinities, even though it focuses on the role of chromatin remodeling rather than specific non-coding variants.
